**Input:**

- explanation: `Make karma-jest optional so Karma server starts even if module is not installed.`
- input:

```
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: d:\at-template\at1\laughing-octo-journey\karma.conf.js
@@
 module.exports = function (config) {
+  let karmaJest;
+  try {
+    karmaJest = require('karma-jest');
+  } catch {
+    karmaJest = null;
+  }
 
   const plugins = [
     require('karma-jasmine'),
     require('karma-chrome-launcher'),
     require('karma-jasmine-html-reporter'),
     require('karma-coverage'),
-    require('karma-jest')
   ];
+
+  const frameworks = ['jasmine'];
+
+  if (karmaJest) {
+    plugins.push(karmaJest);
+    frameworks.push('jest');
+  }
 
   config.set({
     basePath: '',
-    frameworks: ['jasmine', 'jest'],
+    frameworks,
*** End Patch
```


</details></tool-use>
